description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and defines two stages: build and pages. In the build stage add a build job that runs the exact commands: npm install --only=dev, npm install --global grunt-cli, grunt, mkdir public, and mv {content,css,js,lib,plugin}/ index.html pdf.css public/; it stores the public/ directory as an artifact named public that expires in 31 days. In the pages stage add a pages job that depends on the build job, runs only on the master branch, executes the command echo 'publishing deck', and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
